items.q: Do foreign employers need a Vietnamese legal entity to hire staff?
items.a: No. Through our Employer of Record service you can hire employees in Vietnam without establishing your own legal entity — we act as the legal employer on your behalf.

items.q: Can employers manage payroll remotely from abroad?
items.a: Yes. We set up and run payroll on your behalf, handling gross-to-net calculations, PIT and insurance so you can manage your workforce remotely while staying compliant.

items.q: What is included in an HR outsourcing package?
items.a: Packages typically cover payroll processing, social insurance management, labor registration, personal income tax filing and ongoing HR compliance support, tailored to your needs.

sections.title: Simplify HR & payroll in Vietnam
